phrases.context: A polite, direct request for assistance; suitable in both formal and everyday contexts
phrases.contextBs: Pristojan, direktan zahtjev za pomoć; prikladan u formalnim i svakodnevnim kontekstima

phrases.arabic: أَرْجُو مِنْكَ أَنْ تَنْظُرَ فِي هَذَا الأَمْرِ
phrases.bs: Molim te da razmotriš ovo pitanje
phrases.en: I ask you to look into this matter
phrases.context: A polite, formal request asking someone to consider or investigate something
phrases.contextBs: Pristojan, formalan zahtjev kojim se traži od nekoga da razmotri ili istraži nešto

phrases.bs: Volio/voljela bih da od vas zatražim...
phrases.en: I would like to ask you for...
phrases.context: Softened, formal request opener; used before stating a specific need or favour
phrases.contextBs: Ublažen, formalan uvod u zahtjev; koristi se prije iznošenja konkretne potrebe ili molbe

phrases.context: Very polite request form; implies the other person is doing you a favour by agreeing
phrases.contextBs: Veoma pristojana forma zahtjeva; implicira da vam druga osoba čini uslugu pristajanjem

phrases.context: Highly formal request phrase used in official letters, petitions, and institutional correspondence
phrases.contextBs: Visoko formalna forma zahtjeva koja se koristi u službenim pismima, peticijama i institucionalnoj korespondenciji

phrases.en: Kindly respond / Please be so kind as to reply
phrases.context: Standard phrase in formal written requests expecting a response, such as in official letters
phrases.contextBs: Standardna fraza u formalnim pisanim zahtjevima koji očekuju odgovor, kao što su službena pisma

phrases.context: Common polite expression used to soften a request or to get someone's attention
phrases.contextBs: Uobičajen pristojan izraz koji se koristi za ublažavanje zahtjeva ili privlačenje nečije pažnje

phrases.context: One of the most common ways to say 'please' in MSA; used with everyday and formal requests alike
phrases.contextBs: Jedan od najčešćih načina da se kaže 'molim' u MSA; koristi se uz svakodnevne i formalne zahtjeve

phrases.context: Added to a request to make it less demanding; signals that you understand if the person cannot comply
phrases.contextBs: Dodaje se zahtjevu kako bi bio manje nametljiv; naznačava da razumijete ako osoba ne može ispuniti zahtjev

phrases.en: Do you allow me to speak?
phrases.context: Formal request for permission to take the floor in a meeting, class, or official gathering
phrases.contextBs: Formalni zahtjev za dozvolu da se uzme riječ na sastanku, predavanju ili službenom skupu

phrases.en: Do you permit me to leave?
phrases.context: Formal way to ask permission to leave a meeting, classroom, or formal setting
phrases.contextBs: Formalan način traženja dozvole za odlazak s meeting-a, predavaonice ili formalnog okruženja

phrases.en: May I have access to / take a look at...
phrases.context: Formal request to be given access to information, a document, or a resource
phrases.contextBs: Formalni zahtjev za pristup informaciji, dokumentu ili resursu

phrases.en: I ask your permission to make a suggestion
phrases.context: Very formal opener used before offering an idea in an official meeting or to a superior
phrases.contextBs: Veoma formalan uvod koji se koristi prije iznošenja ideje na službenom sastanku ili nadređenom

phrases.arabic: لَا تَتَرَدَّدْ فِي إِعْلَامِي إِنْ احْتَجْتَ أَيَّ مُسَاعَدَةٍ
phrases.bs: Ne oklijevi me obavijestiti ako ti zatreba bilo kakva pomoć
phrases.en: Do not hesitate to let me know if you need any help
phrases.context: Offer of assistance; often used at the end of a formal message or after completing a task for someone
phrases.contextBs: Ponuda pomoći; često se koristi na kraju formalne poruke ili nakon obavljenog zadatka za nekoga
